description: A red, white and black WANTED poster carrying a small Department of Homeland Security seal in the upper left. Below the WANTED banner is a name line with physical descriptors, then two side-by-side portrait photographs of an adult man with a mustache. A black bar reads HOMICIDE and CRIMINAL FUGITIVE, followed by a paragraph of small italic text describing the case and an ICE Tip Line phone number printed in large red digits at the bottom.
notable_text: WANTED; HOMICIDE; CRIMINAL FUGITIVE; MOST WANTED; ICE Tip Line; 866-347-2423
